issues.description: Effect is missing the conditional requirement: 'You may return 1 of your Characters other than this Character to the owner's hand' is a cost/condition that must be paid before the main effect triggers. The DSL should include a condition that checks if player chooses to return one of their own Characters, then only then does the return-opponent's-character effect resolve.

Target scope is incorrect. Current DSL targets own Characters (ChooseOwnCharacter), but the effect text states 'Return up to 1 Character with a cost of 6 or less to the owner's hand' without specifying scope—this should target opponent's Characters (ChooseOpponentCharacter), as the card effect follows conditional payment structure.
